name: Montana Capital Car Title Loans
description_short: Albuquerque's Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2131 San Mateo Blvd NE offers same-day car title loans and payday advances.
description_long:
Located at 2131 San Mateo Blvd NE space 41b in Albuquerque, Montana Capital Car Title Loans serves the northeast section of the city with accessible walk-in hours. The Albuquerque branch operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM and Saturday 10AM to 5PM, with closed Sundays.

This Albuquerque location offers fast car title loans, personal loans, and payday advances with minimal paperwork. You can contact the store directly at +1 916-884-2481 to discuss your specific borrowing needs, application requirements, and funding timeline.

If you're an Albuquerque resident needing quick cash against your vehicle's title, bring your car keys, valid ID, proof of residency, and title documentation to your appointment. Same-day funding is often available for qualified applicants in the NM area.
address: 2131 San Mateo Blvd NE space 41b, Albuquerque, NM 87110

company_info.headquarters: 2131 San Mateo Blvd NE space 41b, Albuquerque, NM 87110

pros: Same-day or 24-hour funding available, with some customers reporting funds within one hour
Pre-approval in under 5 minutes with no credit score impact reported
No credit check required; explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit and bankruptcies
Borrowers keep their car and keys while repaying the loan
Loan amounts range from $100 to $50,000, serving both micro and larger emergency needs
24/7 online application access and convenient operating hours
4.5-star Google rating with customers citing professional, efficient service and clear communication
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website, preventing informed cost comparison
Title loans are collateral-based products with historically very high interest rates (typically 100%+ APR), though specific rates not shown here
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan payments are missed, as the car title serves as collateral
Funds are delivered as a Bank of America check rather than cash, which some borrowers may find inconvenient
No information provided about repayment terms, loan duration, or total cost of borrowing
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who cannot access traditional bank loans or personal loans
People facing immediate emergency cash needs who have a vehicle with equity and can repay within the loan term
Borrowers who own their vehicle outright or with low remaining loan balance and need funds within 24 hours
diagnosis: Montana Capital is best suited for borrowers with damaged or no credit history who own a vehicle with equity and face urgent cash needs, but only after understanding that title loans typically carry very high interest rates and APRs. The critical caveat is that this website entirely omits rate, fee, and repayment cost information—borrowers must call or visit in person to understand the true cost before committing to this high-risk form of secured lending.
services: Online title loan application and pre-approval (under 5 minutes)
In-person title loan application at physical locations
Same-day to 24-hour funding for approved applicants
Direct deposit of loan funds to borrower's bank account
Pick-up of funds as Bank of America check at nearest location
Loan amounts from $100 to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
Title return upon final loan payment
SMS/text reminder notifications for loan payments
Customer service support for loan payoff and account questions
meta_description: Montana Capital Car Title Loans at 2131 San Mateo Blvd NE, Albuquerque, NM. Same-day car title loans and payday advances.
